title: helianthopsis mollis
intro: Helianthopsis mollis, also known as the soft helianthopsis or soft helianthus, is a plant species in the daisy family, native to tropical Africa. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Helianthopsis mollis include the potential treatment of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helianthopsis mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
